scripts.build:genders: node tools/generate-gender-hints.mjs && node tools/sync-artist-genders.mjs && node tools/reapply-genders.mjs karaoke-master-extra.js --minify
scripts.refresh:data: npm run retag:genres && npm run build:genders && npm run verify:data
scripts.deploy:pages: node tools/build-static.mjs && npx --yes gh-pages -d dist -t true
